achievements.title: Brute Force
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, beat Tomoki without blocking or using counters. (Premium New Game is not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: 'Tis but a Scratch
achievements.description: In Normal difficulty or higher, defeat Hyuga in Chapter 2 without treating your injuries (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: You Dare Use My Own Spells?
achievements.description: In Normal difficulty or higher, beat Yuki by only using counters, grabs and heat actions (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Def Jam
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Fujimoto using Street Fighting level 1 (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: The Masochist of Kamurocho
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Makabe without performing Quick Steps or using Heat Actions (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Payback Time
achievements.description: Bite Makabe on his shoulder (Premium New Game only)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: THE NAKED PANTHER
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Hyuga in Chapter 6 without taking more than 5 hits (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: This Is Fine
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Cho with any body part at flashing red before the fight starts (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Wait and See
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Aramaki without performing KO Strikes and without getting your Torso and Arms injury to orange level (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Throwing Hands
achievements.description: Defeat Shima while his Head injury is at 90% or higher
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Southpaw Stance
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat Shima by using Boxing or Extreme God Hand and without performing grabs (Heat actions are allowed, Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: In Normal or higher, defeat the final boss without using any items (Premium New Game not allowed)
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Master At Work
achievements.description: Get 999 points in every part-time job
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: That Man, Gaia
achievements.description: Beat the final substory boss, Gaia
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: We're Halfway There
achievements.description: Reach rank 20 in the Kamurocho Strongest Ranking
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Climbing up the Rankings
achievements.description: Reach rank 10 in the Kamurocho Strongest Ranking
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: The Very Best
achievements.description: Reach the first rank and defeat NOBU in Kamurocho Strongest Ranking
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Hungry for Life
achievements.description: Order every food and drink item in the game
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: How Many Times Do We Have to Teach You This Lesson?
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Sandbagger
achievements.description: Get a perfect game on Bowling
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Claw, Kick, Claw, Kick
achievements.description: Collect every animal in the UFO Catcher
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: One on One
achievements.description: Clear all the level 1 Co-Op Challenges
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Virtual Insanity
achievements.description: Clear all the level 3 Co-Op challenges
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Your Knife Feels Good
achievements.description: Clear all of the level 5 Co-Op missions
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: There's Not Even Gonna Be a Fight!
achievements.description: Defeat an enemy in 3 seconds or less
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: High Five!
achievements.description: Perform every Tag Team heat action
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: My Fingers Hurt!
achievements.description: Get a score of over 200 at karaoke 10 times
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Knowing Is Not Enough
achievements.description: Learn every Punch and Kick KO Strikes
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Brotherly Fight
achievements.description: Defeat Tenma in the Kamurocho Special Battle Ranking. Only available in Premium Adventure.
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Fatal Battle
achievements.description: Reach the 1st rank in the Kamurocho Special Battle Ranking
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: Fallen Kingdom
achievements.description: Defeat Kingdom's leader and finish the gang substory-line
achievements.author: metwie

achievements.title: I Can See What You See Not
achievements.author: metwie
